definitions: To ostracize someone; to deliberately exclude someone from a group or conversation.
To refuse to speak to or interact with someone as a form of punishment or disapproval.
examples: After his betrayal, his colleagues sent him to Coventry.
The whole department sent her to Coventry for leaking the information.
They decided to send him to Coventry until he apologized.
pastTenses: sent to Coventry, sent to Coventry
